aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Presence Sensor Radar**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ321C_fkzihaxe8`  
   - **Issue:** [#97](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/97)  
   - **User:** NoroddH  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:** 
     - `_TZ321C_fkzihaxe8` (drivers: presence_sensor_radar)
     - `_TZ321C_fkzihax8` (drivers: presence_sensor_radar)

2. **PIR Motion Brightness Sensor**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_bquwrqh1`  
   - **Issue:** [#1351](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1351)  
   - **User:** cristianoisaac  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:** 
     - `_TZE284_bquwrqh1` (drivers: presence_sensor_radar)

## Fingerprints Already Supported
- **_TZ321C_fkzihaxe8** (presence_sensor_radar)
- **_TZ321C_fkzihax8** (presence_sensor_radar)
- **_TZE284_bquwrqh1** (presence_sensor_radar)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Update driver.compose.json**  
   - **PR:** [#10](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/10)  
   - **User:** Peter-Celica  
   - **Status:** Closed (not merged)  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`

2. **Update driver.compose.json**  
   - **PR:** [#45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Status:** Closed (merged)  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`

3. **Support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor**  
   - **PR:** [#46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Status:** Closed (not merged)  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`

4. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202**  
   - **PR:** [#1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)  
   - **User:** chernals  
   - **Status:** Closed (not merged)  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`

5. **Added TS110E driver**  
   - **PR:** [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)  
   - **User:** PiTRiS87  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`

6. **Added 3 new devices**  
   - **PR:** [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)  
   - **User:** Peter-Celica  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`

7. **Update driver.compose.json**  
   - **PR:** [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)  
   - **User:** Melectro1  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`

8. **Update driver.compose.json**  
   - **PR:** [#1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)  
   - **User:** Melectro1  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`

9. **Add support for `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`**  
   - **PR:** [#1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)  
   - **User:** YuriEstevan  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`

This summary captures the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting new device requests, existing support, and ongoing contributions.
